What actually happened.

- **OS version:** (e.g. Android 14, iOS 17.2)
- **App version:** (e.g. 0.3.0)
- **Signal K server:** (e.g. OpenPlotter 5.x, none)
- **Connection type:** (Signal K / NMEA TCP / NMEA UDP / none)
